3.boxfitting: FX BOXFITTING. Apply box fitting effect on selected images, as displayed the web page
3.cartoon: FX CARTOON. Apply cartoon effect on selected images.
3.color_ellipses: FX COLOR ELLIPSES. Add random color ellipses to selected images.
3.cubism: FX CUBISM. Apply cubism effect on selected images.
3.draw_whirl: FX DRAW WHIRL. Apply whirl drawing effect on selected images.
3.drop_shadow: FX DROP SHADOW. Drop shadow behind selected images.
3.ellipsionism: FX ELLIPSIONISM. Apply ellipsionism filter to selected images.
3.fire_edges: FX FIRE EDGES. Generate fire effect from edges of selected images.
3.fractalize: FX FRACTALIZE. Randomly fractalize selected images.
3.glow: FX GLOW. Add soft glow on selected images.
3.halftone: FX HALFTONE. Apply halftone dithering to selected images.
3.hardsketchbw: FX HARDSKETCHBW. Apply hard B&W sketch effect on selected images.
3.hearts: FX HEARTS. Apply heart effect on selected images.
3.houghsketchbw: FX HOUGHSKETCHBW. Apply hough B&W sketch effect on selected images.
3.lightrays: FX LIGHTRAYS. Generate ray lights from the edges of selected images.
3.light_relief: FX LIGHT RELIEF. Apply relief light to selected images.
3.mosaic: FX MOSAIC. Create random mosaic from selected images.
3.old_photo: FX OLD PHOTO. Apply old photo effect on selected images.
3.pencilbw: FX PENCIL BW. Apply B&W pencil effect on selected images.
3.pixelsort: FX PIXELSORT. Apply a pixel sorting algorithm on selected images, as described in the page :
3.polaroid: FX POLAROID. Create polaroid effect in selected images.
3.polygonize: FX POLYGONIZE. Apply polygon effect on selected images.
3.poster_edges: FX POSTER EDGES. Apply poster edges effect on selected images.
3.poster_hope: FX POSTER HOPE. Apply Hope stencil poster effect on selected images.
3.rodilius: FX RODILIUS. Apply rodilius (fractalius-like) filter on selected images.
3.cracks: FX CRACKS. Draw random cracks on selected images with specified color.
3.light_patch: FX LIGHT PATCH. Add light patches to selected images.
3.pixelize: FX PIXELIZE. Pixelize selected images with specified scales.
3.scanlines: FX SCANLINES. Apply ripple deformation on selected images.
3.shade_stripes: FX SHADE STRIPES. Add shade stripes to selected images.
3.shadow_patch: FX SHADOW PATCH. Add shadow patches to selected images.
3.spread: FX SPREAD. Spread pixel values of selected images randomly along x,y and z.
3.stripes_y: FX STRIPES Y. Add vertical stripes to selected images.
3.texturize_canvas: FX TEXTURE CANVAS. Add paint canvas texture to selected images.
3.texturize_paper: FX TEXTURIZE PAPER. Add paper texture to selected images.
3.vignette: FX VIGNETTE. Add vignette effect to selected images.
3.watermark_visible: FX WATERMARK VISIBLE. Add or remove a visible watermark on selected images (value range must be [0,255]).
3.area: FX AREA. Compute area of connected components in selected images.
3.area_fg: FX AREA FG. Compute area of connected components for non-zero values in selected images. Similar to area except that 0-valued pixels are not considered.
3.at_curve: FX AT CURVE. Retrieve pixels of the selected images belonging to the specified cubic spline curve that passes across the specified points.
3.canny: FX CANNY. Locate image edges using Canny edge detector.
3.edges: FX EDGES. Estimate contours of selected images.
3.fftpolar: FX FFTPOLAR. Compute fourier transform of selected images, as centered magnitude/phase images.
3.isophotes: FX ISOPHOTES. Render isophotes of selected images on a transparent background.
3.max_patch: FX MAX_PATCH. Return locations of maximal values in local patch-based neighborhood of given size for selected images.
3.min_patch: FX MIN_PATCH. Return locations of minimal values in local patch-based neighborhood of given size for selected images.
3.patches2img: FX PATCHES TO IMG. Recompose 2D images from their selected patch representations.
3.segment_watershed: FX SEGMENT WATERSHED. Apply watershed segmentation on selected images.
3.slic: FX SLIC. Segment selected 2D images with superpixels, using the SLIC algorithm (Simple Linear Iterative Clustering).
3.tones: FX TONES. Get N tones masks from selected images.
3.topographic_map: FX TOPOGRAPHIC MAP. Render selected images as topographic maps.
3.variance_patch: FX VARIANCE PATCH. Compute variance of each images patch centered at (x,y), in selected images
3.bandpass: FX BANDPASS. Apply bandpass filter to selected images.
3.bilateral: BILATERAL. Blur selected images by anisotropic (eventually joint/cross) bilateral filtering.
3.blur: FX BLUR. Blur selected images by a Deriche or gaussian filter (recursive implementation)
3.blur_angular: FX BLUR ANGULAR. Apply angular blur on selected images.
3.blur_bloom:
FX BLUR BLOOM. Apply a bloom filter that blend multiple blur filters of different radii,
resulting in a larger but sharper glare than a simple blur.
3.blur_linear: FX BLUR LINEAR. Apply linear blur on selected images, with specified angle and amplitudes.
3.blur_radial: FX BLUR RADIAL. Apply radial blur on selected images.
3.blur_selective: FX BLUR SELECTIVE. Blur selected images using selective gaussian scales.
3.boxfilter: FX BOXFILTER. Apply box filter to selected images.
3.closing: FX CLOSING. Apply morphological closing to selected images.
3.closing_circ: FX CLOSING CIRC. Apply circular dilation of selected images by specified size.
3.curvature: FX CURVATURE. Compute isophote curvatures on selected images.
3.deriche:
FX DERICHE Apply Deriche recursive filter on selected images, along specified axis and with
specified standard deviation, order and boundary conditions.
3.dilate: FX DILATE. Dilate selected images by a rectangular or the specified structuring element.
3.dilate_circ: FX DILATE CIRC. Apply circular dilation of selected images by specified size.
3.dilate_oct: FX DILATE OCT. Apply octagonal dilation of selected images by specified size.
3.dilate_threshold: FX DILATE THRESHOLD. Dilate selected images in the (X,Y,Z,I) space.
3.divergence: FX DIVERGENCE.Compute divergence of selected vector fields.
3.diffusiontensors: FX DIFFUSIONTENSORS. Compute the diffusion tensors of selected images for edge-preserving smoothing algorithms.
3.dog: FX DOG. Compute difference of gaussian on selected images.
3.erode: FX ERODE Erode selected images by a rectangular or the specified structuring element.
3.erode_circ: FX ERODE CIRC. Apply circular erosion of selected images by specified size.
3.erode_oct: FX ERODE OCT. Apply octagonal erosion of selected images by specified size.
3.erode_threshold: FX ERODE THRESHOLD. Erode selected images in the (X,Y,Z,I) space.
3.gradient: FX GRADIENT. Compute the gradient components (first derivatives) of selected images, along specified axes. (no arg) compute all significant components.
3.gradient_norm: GX GRADIENT NORM. Compute the gradient norm of selected images.
3.gradient_orientation: FX GRADIENT ORIENTATION. Compute N-d gradient orientation of selected images.
3.guided: FX GUIDED. Blur selected images by guided image filtering.
3.haar: FX HAAR. Compute the direct haar multiscale wavelet transform of selected images.
3.heat_flow: FX HEAT FLOW. Apply iterations of the heat flow on selected images.
3.hessian: FX HESSIAN. Compute the hessian components (second derivatives) of selected images along specified axes. (no arg) compute all significant components.
3.iee: FX IEE. Compute gradient-orthogonal-directed 2nd derivative of image(s).
3.ifft: FX IFFT. Compute the inverse fourier transform (real and imaginary parts) of selected images. optionally along the specified axes only.
3.ihaar: FX IHAAR. Compute the inverse haar multiscale wavelet transform of selected images.
3.ilaplacian:
FX ILAPLACIAN. Invert selected Laplacian images. If given nb_iterations is 0, inversion is done in Fourier space (single iteration),
otherwise, by applying nb_iterations of a Laplacian-inversion PDE flow.
Note that the resulting inversions are just estimation of possible/approximated solutions.
3.inn: FX INN.Compute gradient-directed 2nd derivative of image(s).
3.inpaint:
FX INPAINT. Inpaint selected images by specified mask. If no patch size (or 0) is specified, inpainting is done using a fast average or median algorithm.
Otherwise, it used a patch-based reconstruction method, that can be very time consuming.
3.inpaint_holes: FX INPAINT HOLES. Inpaint all connected regions having an area less than specified value.
3.kuwahara: FX KUWAHARA. Apply Kuwahara filter of specified size on selected images.
3.laplacian: FX LAPLACIAN. Compute Laplacian of selected images.
3.map_tones: FX MAP TONES. Apply tone mapping operator on selected images, based on Poisson equation.
3.map_tones_fast: FX MAP TONES FAST. Apply fast tone mapping operator on selected images.
3.meancurvature_flow: FX MEANCURVATURE FLOW. Apply iterations of the mean curvature flow on selected images.
3.median: FX MEDIAN. Apply (opt. thresholded) median filter on selected images with structuring element size x size.
3.normalize_local: FX NORMALIZE LOCAL. Normalize selected images locally.
3.opening: FX OPENING. Apply morphological opening to selected images.
3.opening_circ: FX OPENING CIRCL. Apply circular opening of selected images by specified size.
3.peronamalik_flow: FX PERONAMALIK FLOW. Apply iterations of the Perona-Malik flow on selected images.
3.pde_flow: FX PDE FLOW. Apply iterations of a generic PDE flow on selected images.
3.periodize_poisson: FX PERIODIZE POISSION. Periodize selected images using a Poisson solver in Fourier space.
3.remove_pixels: FX REMOVE PIXELS. Remove specified number of pixels (i.e. set them to 0) from the set of non-zero pixels in selected images.
3.rolling_guidance: FX ROLLING GUIDANCE. Apply the rolling guidance filter on selected image.
3.sharpen: FX SHARPEN. Sharpen selected images by inverse diffusion or shock filters methods.
3.sharpen_alpha: FX SHARPEN ALPHA. Sharpen selected images using a multi-scale and alpha boosting algorithm.
3.split_freq: FX SPLIT FREQ. Split selected images into low and high frequency parts.
3.solve_poisson:
FX SOLVE POISSON. Solve Poisson equation so that applying laplaciann is close to the result of laplacian_commandn. Solving is performed using a multi-scale gradient descent algorithm.
If nb_scales=0, the number of scales is automatically determined.
3.split_details:
FX SPLIT DETAILS. Split selected images into nb_scales detail scales. If base_scale = detail_scale = 0, the image decomposition is done with a trous wavelets.
Otherwise, it uses laplacian pyramids with linear standard deviations.
 nb_scales=0, base_scale=0 and detail_scale=0
3.structuretensors: FX STRUCTURETENSORS. Compute the structure tensor field of selected images.
3.solidify: FX SOLIDIFY. Solidify selected transparent images.
3.syntexturize: FX SYNTEXTURIZE. Resynthetize width'x'height versions of selected micro-textures by phase randomization.
3.syntexturize_matchpatch: FX SYNTEXTURIZE MATCHPATCH. Resynthetize width'x'height versions of selected micro-textures using a patch-matching algorithm.
3.tv_flow: FX TV FLOW. Apply iterations of the total variation flow on selected images.
3.unsharp: FX UNSHARP. Apply unsharp mask on selected images.
3.unsharp_octave: FX UNSHARP OCTAVE. Apply octave sharpening on selected images.
3.vanvliet: FX VANVLIET. Apply Vanvliet recursive filter on selected images, along specified axis and with
3.voronoi: FX VORONOI. Compute the discrete Voronoi diagram of non-zero pixels in selected images.
3.watermark_fourier: FX WATERMARK FOURIER. Add a textual watermark in the frequency domain of selected images.
3.array: FX ARRAY. Create MxN array from selected images.
3.array_fade: FX ARRAY FADE. Create MxN array from selected images.
3.array_mirror: FX ARRAY MIRROR. Create 2^Nx2^N array from selected images.
3.array_random: FX ARRAY RANDOM. Create MdxNd array of tiles from selected MsxNs source arrays.
3.frame: FX FRAME. Insert outer frame in selected images, along the specified axes.
3.frame_blur: FX FRAME BLUR. Draw RGBA-colored round frame in selected images.
3.frame_cube: FX FRAME CUBE. Insert 3D frames in selected images.
3.frame_fuzzy: FX FRAME FUZZY. Draw RGBA-colored fuzzy frame in selected images.
3.frame_pattern: FX FRAME PATTERNS. Insert selected pattern frame in selected images.
3.frame_seamless: FX FRAME SEAMLESS. Insert frame in selected images, so that tiling the resulting image makes less visible seams.
3.img2ascii: FX IMG TO ASCII. Render selected images as binary ascii art.
3.imagegrid: FX IMAGE GRID. Create MxN image grid from selected images.
3.imagegrid_hexagonal: FX IMAGEGRID HEXAGONAL. Create hexagonal grids from selected images.
3.imagegrid_triangular: FX IMAGEGRID TRIANGULAR. Create triangular grids from selected images.
3.pack:
FX PACK. Pack selected images into a single image. The returned status contains the list of new (x,y) offsets for each input image.
Parameter is_ratio_constraint tells if the resulting image must tend to a square image.
3.puzzle: FX PUZZLE. Input puzzle binary mask with specified size and geometry.
3.rotate_tiles: FX ROTATE TILES. Apply MxN tiled-rotation effect on selected images.
3.shift_tiles: FX SHIFT TILES. Apply MxN tiled-shift effect on selected images.
3.taquin: FX TAQUIN. Create MxN taquin puzzle from selected images.
3.tunnel: FX TUNNEL. Apply tunnel effect on selected images.
3.deform: FX DEFORM. Apply random smooth deformation on selected images.
3.euclidean2polar: FX EUCLIDEAN TO POLAR. Apply euclidean to polar transform on selected images.
3.equirectangular2nadirzenith: FX EQUIRECTANGULAR 2 NADIRZNITH. Transform selected equirectangular images to nadir/zenith rectilinear projections.
3.fisheye: FX FISHEYE. Apply fish-eye deformation on selected images.
3.flower: FX FLOWER. Apply flower deformation on selected images.
3.kaleidoscope: FX KALEIDOSCOPE. Create kaleidoscope effect from selected images.
3.map_sphere: FX MAP SPHERE. Map selected images on a sphere.
3.nadirzenith2equirectangular: FX NADIRZNITH TO EQUIRECTANGULAR. Transform selected nadir/zenith rectilinear projections to equirectangular images.
3.polar2euclidean: FX POLAR 2 EUCLIDEAN. Apply euclidean to polar transform on selected images.
3.raindrops: FX RAINDROPS. Apply raindrops deformation on selected images.
3.ripple: FX RIPPLE. Apply ripple deformation on selected images.
3.rotoidoscope: FX ROTOIDOSCOPE. Create rotational kaleidoscope effect from selected images.
3.spherize: FX SPHERIZE. Apply spherize effect on selected images.
3.symmetrize: FX SYMMETRIZE. Symmetrize selected images regarding specified axis.
3.transform_polar: FX TRANSFORM POLAR. Apply user-defined transform on polar representation of selected images.
3.twirl: FX TWIRL. Apply twirl deformation on selected images.
3.warp_perspective: FX WARP PERSPECTIVE. Warp selected images with perspective deformation.
3.water: FX WATER. Apply water deformation on selected images.
3.wave: FX WAVE. Apply wave deformation on selected images.
3.wind: FX WIND. Apply wind effect on selected images.
3.zoom: FX ZOOM. Apply zoom factor to selected images.
3.append: FX APPEND. Append specified image to selected images, or all selected images together, along specified axis.
3.append_tiles: FX APPEND TILES. Append MxN selected tiles as new images.
3.apply_scales: FX APPLY SCALES. Apply specified command on different scales of selected images.
3.channels: FX CHANNELS. Keep only specified channels of selected images.
3.rotate_tileable: FX ROTATE TILEABLE. Rotate selected images by specified angle and make them tileable.
3.split_tiles: FX SPLIT TILES. Split selected images as a MxN array of tiles.

old_photo.dog: FX DOG. Compute difference of gaussian on selected images.
4-1: SET THE SEED FOR ALL 100 A-ELEMENTS. Reproduce the result on canvas faithfully on subsequent Regenerations.
SET THE SEED FOR ALL 100 B-ELEMENTS. Reproduce the result on canvas faithfully on subsequent Regenerations.
SET THE SEED FOR ALL 100 C-ELEMENTS. Reproduce the result on canvas faithfully on subsequent Regenerations.
